pundit.name: Alexi Lalas
pundit.take: **"Ghost Pepper" and "Bubba G," this matchup screams desperation as much as your drafts screamed 'I have no idea what I'm doing!'** Look, let me tell you something, Norway barely showed up under the Northern Lights and Devin, you want to call yourself a manager with that lineup? Spain can't carry you forever! And Gunner, "Bubba G," you’re hanging out with France as if they're going to magically save the day. France has the talent, but you’re treating them like a Get Out of Jail Free card, and we both know those are in short supply, especially when your other picks are from planet random. Mark my words, this is the battle of who can manage not to embarrass themselves more than the other. I’m putting my chips on France to overrun Norway, simply because Devin's ship is taking on water faster than he can bail it out. Final word: if you don't fix your fantasy logic, you’ll be swapping jerseys with the bottom of the standings. Consider this your wake-up call.

pundit_takes.subtitle: Experts baffled as Noisemaker's random picks still beat seasoned managers.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gunner slipped and let a 15-year-old rookie shake his model-favorite status.
Rafe's Tier-1 dependency? Nada. Still making waves with zero Tier-1 knowledge.
Devin, check your mirrors! Rafe's owned you twice, and he's Dad's rookie rival.
The model underestimated the chaos: Rafe's Ecuador even took down mighty Germany.
